2605.00371.title: GaMMA: Towards Joint Global-Temporal Music Understanding in Large Multimodal Models
2605.00371.paper_summary: In this paper, we propose GaMMA, a state-of-the-art (SoTA) large multimodal model (LMM) designed to achieve comprehensive musical content understanding. GaMMA inherits the streamlined encoder-decoder design of LLaVA, enabling effective cross-modal learning between music and language. By incorporating audio encoders in a mixture-of-experts manner, GaMMA effectively unifies both time-series and non-time-series music understanding tasks within one set of parameters. Our approach combines carefully curated datasets at scale with a progressive training pipeline, effectively pushing the boundaries of music understanding via pretraining, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL). To comprehensively assess both temporal and non-temporal capability of music LMMs, we introduce MusicBench, the largest music-oriented benchmark, comprising 3,739 human-curated multiple-choice questions covering diverse aspects of musical understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GaMMA establishes new SoTA in the music domain, achieving 79.1% accuracy on MuchoMusic, 79.3% on MusicBench-Temporal, and 81.3% on MusicBench-Global, consistently outperforming previous methods.
2605.00371.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了GaMMA，一種最先進的（SoTA）大型多模態模型（LMM），旨在實現全面的音樂內容理解。<lb/>GaMMA繼承了LLaVA的精簡編碼器-解碼器設計，使音樂與語言之間的跨模態學習變得有效。<lb/>通過以專家混合的方式整合音頻編碼器，GaMMA有效地將時間序列和非時間序列的音樂理解任務統一在一組參數內。<lb/>我們的方法將精心策劃的大規模數據集與漸進式訓練管道相結合，通過預訓練、監督微調（SFT）和增強學習（RL），有效地推動音樂理解的邊界。<lb/>為了全面評估音樂LMM的時間和非時間能力，我們引入了MusicBench，這是最大的音樂導向基準，包含3,739個人類策劃的多選題，涵蓋音樂理解的各個方面。<lb/>廣泛的實驗表明，GaMMA在音樂領域建立了新的SoTA，在MuchoMusic上達到79.1%的準確率，在MusicBench-Temporal上達到79.3%，在MusicBench-Global上達到81.3%，始終超越以往的方法。
2605.00371.author: Zuyao You et.al.
2605.00371.authors: Zuyao You, Zhesong Yu, Mingyu Liu, Bilei Zhu, Yuan Wan, Zuxuan Wu
